'''âz-g-b''' ('''zagaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:modify|modify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:modify|modify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-g-b
|-
! Lemma
| zagaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zagabithi|zagabithi]] || [[word:zagabiji|zagabiji]] || [[word:zagabishi|zagabishi]] || [[word:zagabi|zagabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagabuthuth|zagabuthuth]] || [[word:zagabujuj|zagabujuj]] || [[word:zagabushush|zagabushush]] || [[word:zagab|zagab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagabuthu|zagabuthu]] || [[word:zagabuju|zagabuju]] || [[word:zagabushu|zagabushu]] || [[word:zagabu|zagabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagabufuth|zagabufuth]] || [[word:zagabufuj|zagabufuj]] || [[word:zagabufush|zagabufush]] || [[word:zagabuf|zagabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zagabethe|zagabethe]] || [[word:zagabeje|zagabeje]] || [[word:zagabeshe|zagabeshe]] || [[word:zagabe|zagabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagabothoth|zagabothoth]] || [[word:zagabojoj|zagabojoj]] || [[word:zagaboshosh|zagaboshosh]] || [[word:zagab|zagab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagabotho|zagabotho]] || [[word:zagabojo|zagabojo]] || [[word:zagabosho|zagabosho]] || [[word:zagabo|zagabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagabofoth|zagabofoth]] || [[word:zagabofoj|zagabofoj]] || [[word:zagabofosh|zagabofosh]] || [[word:zagabof|zagabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zagabĂŠthĂŠ|zagabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zagabĂŠjĂŠ|zagabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zagabĂŠshĂŠ|zagabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zagabĂŠ|zagabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagabathath|zagabathath]] || [[word:zagabajaj|zagabajaj]] || [[word:zagabashash|zagabashash]] || [[word:zagab|zagab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagabatha|zagabatha]] || [[word:zagabaja|zagabaja]] || [[word:zagabasha|zagabasha]] || [[word:zagaba|zagaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagabafath|zagabafath]] || [[word:zagabafaj|zagabafaj]] || [[word:zagabafash|zagabafash]] || [[word:zagabaf|zagabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zagabasha|zagabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozagabasha|gozagabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizagabasha|gokizagabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zagabnĂŒsha|zagabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozagabnknĂŒsha|gozagabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizagabnĂŒsha|gokizagabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zagabshĂ«sha|zagabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozagabnkshĂ«sha|gozagabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizagabshĂ«sha|gokizagabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zagabrosha|zagabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozagabnkrosha|gozagabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizagabrosha|gokizagabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zagabmusha|zagabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagabnkmusha|gozagabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagabmusha|gokizagabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zagabsherasha|zagabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozagabnksherasha|gozagabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizagabsherasha|gokizagabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zagabngasha|zagabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozagabnkngasha|gozagabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizagabngasha|gokizagabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zagabyasha|zagabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozagabnkyasha|gozagabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizagabyasha|gokizagabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zagabyamasha|zagabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozagabnkyamasha|gozagabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizagabyamasha|gokizagabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zagabnĂŒshĂ«sha|zagabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozagabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozagabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizagabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizagabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zagabnĂŒrosha|zagabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozagabnknĂŒrosha|gozagabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizagabnĂŒrosha|gokizagabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagabnĂŒmusha|zagabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagabnknĂŒmusha|gozagabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagabnĂŒmusha|gokizagabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zagabshĂ«nĂŒsha|zagabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozagabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozagabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizagabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizagabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zagabshĂ«rosha|zagabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozagabnkshĂ«rosha|gozagabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizagabshĂ«rosha|gokizagabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagabshĂ«musha|zagabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagabnkshĂ«musha|gozagabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagabshĂ«musha|gokizagabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zagabronĂŒsha|zagabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozagabnkronĂŒsha|gozagabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizagabronĂŒsha|gokizagabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zagabroshĂ«sha|zagabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozagabnkroshĂ«sha|gozagabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizagabroshĂ«sha|gokizagabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagabromusha|zagabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagabnkromusha|gozagabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagabromusha|gokizagabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zagabmunĂŒsha|zagabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozagabnkmunĂŒsha|gozagabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizagabmunĂŒsha|gokizagabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zagabmushĂ«sha|zagabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozagabnkmushĂ«sha|gozagabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizagabmushĂ«sha|gokizagabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zagabmurosha|zagabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozagabnkmurosha|gozagabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizagabmurosha|gokizagabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zagab|zagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠb|zĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozagab|hozagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠgĂŠb|hozĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozagab|hohozagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠgĂŠb|hohozĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzagab|nĂŒzagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠgĂŠb|nĂŒzĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzagab|nĂŒnĂŒzagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠgĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzagab|nĂŻzagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠgĂŠb|nĂŻzĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzagab|nĂŻnĂŻzagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠgĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzagab|luzagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠgĂŠb|luzĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzagab|luluzagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠgĂŠb|luluzĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizagab|lizagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠgĂŠb|lizĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizagab|lilizagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠgĂŠb|lilizĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozagab|kozagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠgĂŠb|kozĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozagab|kokozagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠgĂŠb|kokozĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezagab|kezagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠgĂŠb|kezĂŠgĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezagab|kekezagab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠgĂŠb|kekezĂŠgĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
